summary: Tested Product of the Week email digest enhancement. Backend: 11/11 tests passed for GET /api/email/product-of-the-week (public endpoint returning featured product, runners_up, week_of) and POST /api/email/send-product-of-the-week (requires X-API-Key). Frontend: POTW section displays correctly on landing page with featured product card, runners-up, View Analysis button, Unlock Full Insights button, See All Trending link. Email templates use TrendScout branding (not ViralScout).
passed_tests: POTW response has featured product with launch_score, product_name, category, trend_stage, id
POTW response has runners_up array with valid structure
POTW response has week_of date string
Email service uses TrendScout branding (not ViralScout in HTML templates)
Weekly digest email subject uses TrendScout
Landing page has Trending nav link in header
Landing page has Product of the Week section with data-testid='potw-section'
Featured product card displays product name, category, Market Score, Trend Score, Est. Margin, Launch Score
See All Trending link navigates to /trending-products
3 runner-up cards displayed with product name, category, and launch_score
critical_code_review_comments: POTW implementation correctly follows TrendScout branding throughout
API endpoint properly returns launch_score as primary ranking metric
Email service includes referral_code for viral loop in POTW emails
Frontend component uses proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
test_credentials: API key for send endpoint: X-API-Key: vs_automation_key_2024
seed_data_creation: None - used existing products from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product of the Week feature fully tested. GET /api/email/product-of-the-week is public (no auth). POST /api/email/send-product-of-the-week requires X-API-Key header with value 'vs_automation_key_2024'. Landing page POTW section uses data-testid attributes: potw-section, potw-featured-card, potw-product-name, potw-launch-score, potw-view-btn, potw-signup-btn, potw-see-all-btn, potw-runner-{0,1,2}.

ui_elements: Market Score, Trend Score, Est. Margin
